title: Write an initial AI-authored C-LARA-2 technical report in LaTeX
notes: Suggestion #8 from admin export (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-06). Prepare a detailed initial C-LARA-2 technical report reflecting project status around late May or early June 2026, suitable for citation in the EuroCALL 2026 paper submission cycle and related publications. The report should follow the C-LARA-2 AI-assisted workflow: AI authorship with humans providing suggestions/review. Start by evaluating whether Codex can draft the report unaided; if useful, investigate a workflow where ChatGPT-5.x provides suggestions to Codex. Use LaTeX as the likely output format for consistency with earlier reports.
